text.heos.maxPasswordChars: §6Password can be at most %d characters long!
text.heos.minPasswordChars: §6Password must be at least %d characters long!
text.heos.onlinePlayerLogin: §aYou are using an online account. No login required.
text.heos.authServiceUnavailable:
§cPremium authentication is temporarily unavailable.
Please try again later.
text.heos.loginFailureLock:
§cToo many failed login attempts.
Please try again in %d seconds.
text.heos.whitelistKick: You are not on the whitelist.
text.heos.whitelistDeniedLog: Player is not on the whitelist: %s
text.heos.banIpMessage:
Your IP has been banned: %s
Expires: %s
text.heos.changePasswordLoginRequired: Please log in before changing your password.
text.heos.premiumNoPasswordChange: Premium players do not need to change a password.
text.heos.changePasswordNotRegistered: You are not registered. Use /register <password> <confirm password>.
text.heos.newPasswordTooShort: New password is too short. Minimum length is %d characters.
text.heos.newPasswordTooLong: New password is too long. Maximum length is %d characters.
text.heos.newPasswordSameAsOld: New password cannot be the same as the old password.
text.heos.changePasswordFailed: Failed to change password. Please contact an administrator.
text.heos.noPermission: You do not have permission to use this command.
text.heos.playerOnlyCommand: This command can only be used by a player.
text.heos.passwordResetNotice: Your password was reset by an administrator.
text.heos.migrationDisabled: Player data migration is disabled in config.yml.
text.heos.migrationPlayerOnly: Migration must be confirmed by clicking the chat button in game.
text.heos.migrationSamePlayer: Cannot migrate data to the same player.
text.heos.migrationConfirmHint: Click the confirmation button within 60 seconds to execute it.
text.heos.migrationNoPending: No pending migration. Use /heos migrate <source> <target> first.
text.heos.migrationInvalidConfirmation: Invalid migration confirmation. Please click the latest confirmation button.
text.heos.migrationExpired: Pending migration expired. Use /heos migrate <source> <target> again.
text.heos.migrationSourceDisconnect: Your data is being migrated to another account. Please log in again later.
text.heos.migrationTargetDisconnect: Data is being migrated to your account. Please log in again later.
text.heos.migrationUuidFailed: Could not resolve migration player UUID.
text.heos.migrationTemporaryBan: Source player temporarily banned for %d seconds.
